pi_items.source: Checked export_result.sh QUARANTINE_DIR variable and task description.
Checked export_result.sh TARGET_FILE variable and task description.
Performed HTTP request to confirm the URL resolves to a valid PDF file on the official RFC Editor site.
Checked export_result.sh which explicitly checks for these values in the prefs.js file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires hardening the Tor Browser by modifying specific about:config preferences (pdfjs.disabled=True, webgl.disabled=True, javascript.options.wasm=False). The agent must then download the real TLS 1.3 specification PDF from https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/pdfrfc/rfc8446.txt.pdf and save it to the exact quarantine directory /home/ga/Documents/Quarantine/rfc8446.pdf. The task data uses real public information (the official RFC document) and is not synthetic.
